title: 72-hour kit reality audit
summary: Carry the kit through the actual exit route, test weight, open every container, check dates, confirm medicines and documents, and simulate one meal and one night.
content: Carry the kit through the actual exit route, test weight, open every container, check dates, confirm medicines and documents, and simulate one meal and one night. Adjust the kit to the weakest person, local heat, walking distance, transport, pets, and likely hazards. Do not count an item as available until someone can find and use it in darkness or stress.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “72-hour kit reality audit”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «72-hour kit reality audit»
steps: Carry the kit through the actual exit route, test weight, open every container, check dates, confirm medicines and documents, and simulate one meal and one night.
Adjust the kit to the weakest person, local heat, walking distance, transport, pets, and likely hazards.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for 72-hour kit reality audit.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for 72-hour kit reality audit.
warnings: Do not count an item as available until someone can find and use it in darkness or stress.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for 72-hour kit reality audit.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for 72-hour kit reality audit.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during 72-hour kit reality audit.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for 72-hour kit reality audit.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for 72-hour kit reality audit.
The action creates a new hazard or delays qualified help during 72-hour kit reality audit.
when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for 72-hour kit reality audit.
short_term: For 72-hour kit reality audit, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After 72-hour kit reality audit, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop 72-hour kit reality audit, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt 72-hour kit reality audit to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
